description_long: This is a rectangular, low-profile wooden shelving unit with a rich, medium-brown wood grain finish. The structure features two open horizontal shelves divided by a central vertical partition, creating four compartments for storage or display. The sides and top are made from thick, solid panels, giving the piece a sturdy and robust appearance. The open design allows for easy access from the front, while the back and sides are fully enclosed with the same wood material. The surface is smooth and likely finished with a matte or semi-gloss varnish, enhancing the natural wood pattern. This type of furniture is commonly used as a TV stand, media console, or low storage shelf in urban living rooms, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden shelving unit with four open compartments and a smooth, medium-brown wood grain finish. Ideal for use as a TV stand or low storage shelf in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves divided into four compartments, with visible wood grain and smooth finish.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with no openings or features visible.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, showing the open shelving and compartment structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1 with a solid wood panel and no openings.
